allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3737/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test","contact":"test@example.com","projectType":"Brand Identity","message":"hello world"}' -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Home: %{http_code} | About: %{http_code} | Work: %{http_code} | Contact: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:3001/ http://localhost:3001/about http://localhost:3001/work http://localhost:3001/contact)
